output.summary: Mixed int5/int6 quantized 12-layer transformer uses SmearGate, BigramHash, and U-Net skips with Muon/SWA and PyTorch 2.8 SDPA to stay under 16MB.
output.valOnlyReasoning: No explicit validation-shard or val-only training; standard training with validation evaluation.
techniques: Mixed int5/int6 quantization for MLP and attention weights with fp16 embedding passthrough
SmearGate plus BigramHash context embeddings and U-Net-like skip connections in 12-layer stack
Muon optimizer with SWA warmdown and PyTorch 2.8 SDPA acceleration
